title: Pre-H100 Cost Reduction ROI Audit (V1-V4)
scope: Quick-win cost-reduction ROI items landed before H100 x4 Stage-2 launch (#83).

items.name: spot bid lock verify
items.change: added BID_USD_PER_HR (default 3.50, env-overridable via ANIMA_H100_BID_USD), CLOUD_TIER=secureCloud lock, runtime sanity check (0,10] $/hr, and wired --secureCloud + --cost ${BID_USD_PER_HR} into both dry-run echoed cmds and --apply runpodctl invocation.
items.before: hard-coded --cost 3.50, no --secureCloud / --communityCloud flag, no runtime bid validation.
items.after: explicit cloud_tier=secureCloud + bid ceiling validated; dry-run echoes cloud_tier+bid for audit.
items.estimated_saving_basis: Runpod secureCloud H100 SXM5 spot vs ondemand price gap (2026-04 spot ~$2.99/hr vs ondemand ~$4.49/hr, ≈33%); bid ceiling caps overrun risk.

items.name: Stage-2 → Stage-3 cascade proposal (propose-only)
items.first_run_verdict: PENDING (Stage-2 not yet launched) → action=WAIT — proposal correctly emitted no-op.
items.estimated_saving_basis: auto-shutdown of 4x Stage-2 H100 within minutes of last verified artifact (vs. operator-discovered idle ~30-60 min later) saves ~$3.50/hr * 4 GPUs * (0.5h saved) ≈ $7/run; cascade-spawn removes Stage-3 hand-off latency (~10 min saved). Conservative across full Stage-2/3 cycle ≈ 8% wall-clock cost.

items.name: R2 lifecycle PUT (G37 SPEC apply)
items.diagnosis: rclone s3 backend on this host has no 'lifecycle' subcommand (rclone backend help s3 → restore | restore-status | list-multipart-uploads | cleanup | cleanup-hidden | versioning | set). aws CLI absent.
items.estimated_saving_basis: config/r2_lifecycle_policy.json estimated_savings.monthly_pct_reduction=30 (60% of ckpt objects > 30d * 50% IA discount).

items.name: weekly log rotation (zstd) launchd plist
items.activation_command: cp config/launchd/com.anima.log_rotation_weekly.plist ~/Library/LaunchAgents/ && launchctl bootstrap gui/$(id -u) ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.anima.log_rotation_weekly.plist && launchctl enable gui/$(id -u)/com.anima.log_rotation_weekly
items.estimated_saving_basis: G40 smoke: 58 candidate logs, 89.39% saving = 1,627,779 bytes; weekly ~1.5 MiB. Negligible $ savings, primary value is /tmp pressure relief and reproducibility.

totals.estimated_combined_saving_basis: V1 spot 30% on H100 hourly + V2 cascade 8% wall-clock; V3 storage 30%/mo orthogonal (~$18/mo); V4 disk pressure relief ~1.5 MiB/wk.
